Label: Section 2.3
Issue: does not specify the environment in which the program can be run
Correction: The program can only be run on the specified environment: Windows 10, Ubuntu 20.04, and macOS 11.0 or later.

Label: Section 2.3
Issue: does not specify the compatible neural network topologies
Correction: Only such neural network topologies are supported that are compatible with ONNX format.

Label: FR-U-50
Issue: does not specify what happens if an invalid hardware component is selected
Correction: If an invalid hardware component is selected, an error message shall be displayed and the selection shall be reset to the previous valid state.

Label: FR-U-60
Issue: does not specify supported image formats
Correction: The system shall support importing images in JPEG, JPG, and PNG formats.

Label: FR-U-100
Issue: does not specify the format of the results and diagnostic data
Correction: The results and diagnostic data shall be displayed in a tabular format with columns for inference result, confidence score, latency, hardware information, and neural network identifier.

Label: FR-U-110
Issue: does not specify the format for exporting results and diagnostic data
Correction: The results and diagnostic data shall be exported in CSV format.

Label: FR-A-10
Issue: does not specify what happens if an improper selection is made
Correction: If an improper selection is made, an error message shall be displayed and the selection shall be reset to the previous valid state.

Label: FR-A-30
Issue: does not specify recovery or program state when selection is improper
Correction: Improper Selection is undone and the previous state before the selection is still valid.

Label: FR-A-70
Issue: does not specify the format of the runtime log file
Correction: The runtime log file shall be in plain text format.

Label: PD10
Issue: does not specify the minimum dimensions for input images
Correction: The height and width of import image(s) should be at least 224x224 pixels.

Label: PD20
Issue: does not specify the format for imported neural networks
Correction: Imported neural network topology should be compatible with the specified hardware and in ONNX format.

Label: PD30
Issue: does not specify the format for inference results and diagnostic data
Correction: Inference results and diagnostic data shall be in JSON format.

Label: PD40
Issue: does not specify the format for the runtime log file
Correction: The runtime log file shall be in plain text format.

Label: PD50
Issue: does not specify the format for translation files
Correction: Translation files shall be in Compiled Qt Linguist File (.qm) format.
